# markdown

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Rendered markdown preview for .md and .mdx files.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `FilePane.Renderer` "Markdown" → `MarkdownView`
  - Uses: `conversations/conversation-view/code/file-pane.FilePane`, `conversations/conversation-view/code/file-pane.useFileContent`, `primitives/css/card.Card`, `primitives/css/placeholder.Placeholder`, `primitives/css/text.SectionLabel`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/loading.Loading`, `primitives/markdown.Markdown`
